## Source: amazon-inspector (a53c153f68abdc118a92f4c3a13c2ad21e0d098bdf5e7cf57e679e467b226c06)
The package apexomni was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (84e05c582c9d898b04787eb59f54ae1ea01d506ec94ec86029e2bffc1cd7357c)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'apexomni' @ 99.99.99 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
